name: MANTIS
notes: Reviewed overlay for SN123 using the live MANTIS source repository and linked model-iteration SDK/tooling repository. No standalone website, docs site, public API, OpenAPI, SSE, or data artifact has been verified yet.

gap_notes: The linked model iteration tool repository includes SDK and API guide references for builder workflows.
No verified machine-readable OpenAPI/Swagger schema yet.
No verified safe public subnet API endpoint yet.
No verified standalone static data artifact yet.

surfaces.name: MANTIS source repository
surfaces.notes: Public MANTIS source repository for SN123.

surfaces.name: MANTIS model iteration tool
surfaces.notes: Public SDK/tooling repository linked from the MANTIS source README for strategy iteration, GUI workflows, and local evaluation helpers.

surfaces.name: MANTIS price & funding data artifact
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth JSON data artifact of asset prices and funding rates published by the SN123 MANTIS validator — the PRICE_DATA_URL declared in the official repo's config.py (line 63). Freshness/uptime are probe-derived and not asserted here.

surfaces.name: MANTIS historical datalog archive
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth downloadable SQLite datalog of the SN123 MANTIS validator's full historical multi-asset signal/price time series — the DATALOG_ARCHIVE_URL declared in the official repo's config.py, distinct from and complementary to the latest_prices.json snapshot (this is the complete historical archive, served as a SQLite database file). Verified as a live SQLite artifact (magic bytes 'SQLite format 3'). Freshness/size are probe-derived and not asserted here.
